hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^python[23]?( |$)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Use uv run instead of python/python3 directly in this repo. Example: uv run pytest not python -m pytest"}}'; fi
